basics.name: Sebastian Selinger
basics.label: System Administrator · IT Consultant · QA Expert
basics.summary: IT professional with 10+ years of experience across three pillars: system administration, IT consulting, and quality assurance. System Administrator at the University of Freiburg (IT infrastructure for 25,000+ users), owner of Selinger Consulting, and QA expert with recognized contributions to Microsoft, Netflix, and Amazon. Based in Freiburg, available for projects across the DACH region.

work.name: University of Freiburg
work.summary: Responsible for high availability, IT security, and reliable operations of IT infrastructure serving 25,000+ users. Server administration, network operations, virtualization, and monitoring.

work.name: Selinger Consulting
work.summary: Strategic IT consulting with measurable ROI for businesses in the DACH region. Infrastructure analysis, security audits, technology advisory, and process optimization.

work.name: Keywords Studios
work.summary: Project-based testing for international technology companies as part of the global beta test network.

work.name: Ubisoft
work.summary: Ad-hoc and regression testing of business-critical software products for an international technology company.

work.name: Realworld One
work.summary: Quality assurance for enterprise e-learning software including AR/VR platforms.

work.name: Scientific Games
work.summary: Quality assurance for enterprise software applications.

work.name: XboxDev
work.summary: Founded and operate a community platform with user management and a content system (WordPress, AWS S3, Cloudflare, Linux).

awards.title: Amazon Prime Video Security Research Recognition

projects.name: XboxDev
projects.description: Community platform with user management and content system

projects.name: RBTV.info
projects.description: Development & operation of a community platform

projects.name: Gamescom Countdown
